Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Case removed from Early Settlement Program. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Continued To Apr-08-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is continued to 4/8/2010 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Wendy Pun, CSR #12891.

John G. Warner, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Yuliya Sololova, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Simon Buniak, Buniak, Inc. or Golden State Mitsubishi/Suzuki.
Defaults were entered against these defendants on September 2, 2009.
A general denial to plaintiff's complaint was filed by defendant Franziska Friebert on July 16, 2009.

As there is presently on file a general denial by one the defendants, and plaintiff has not obtained an order for several judgments, this matter is taken OFF CALENDAR.
